title: Umami Silkycelery Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix Portuguese dish featuring silky celery cooked in a low-sodium deglazed sauce for a umami burst.
instructions: Heat the butter in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic, cooking until translucent.
Add celery stalks and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, until they start to soften but are still crisp.
Deglaze the pan with tomato paste, allowing it to brown slightly before adding lemon juice and low-sodium soy sauce.
Reduce heat to medium and simmer until the sauce thickens, stirring occasionally. The cooking time should be around 10-15 minutes total.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
